creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text: Note I am currently preparing a fetchmail 6.4.25 release that really blocks out libressl and fixes the Let's Encrypt workaround for OpenSSL 1.0.2 (I believe it irrelevant for FreeBSD as all base versions should have OpenSSL 1.1.1 these days), and it will also support wolfSSL if someone is into a GPLv2+ licensed port without the OpenSSL library hassle.
